## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Book/prose
- [ ] Code/lab behavior
- [ ] Tests/examples
- [ ] CI/release plumbing
- [ ] Documentation/storefront

## Checks

- [ ] `make html`
- [ ] `make pdf`
- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] Not run; reason:

## Evidence Standard

- [ ] New or changed factual/vendor/performance/safety claims are backed by a primary source, reproducible artifact, local measurement, or clearly labeled interpretation.
- [ ] Not applicable.

## Notes For Review

Mention visual PDF/HTML concerns, screenshots, or follow-up items.
